name: Fried Green Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the tomatoes half an inch thick, but do not peel or core.
2. Drain well between several thicknesses of paper toweling until most of the moisture is absorbed.
3. Make a batter by beating the eggs until light, then mixing in the corn meal, water, minced chives, salt, and pepper.
4. In a large, heavy iron skillet, heat the butter or margarine until bubbly.
5. Dip the tomato slices into batter, and brown quickly on both sides.
6. Serve at once.
